description: The People Nation is an American alliance of street gangs based in Chicago, founded in 1978 by leaders of the Vice Lords, Black P. Stones, and Latin Kings. It is a multiethnic coalition involved in drug trafficking, robbery, money laundering, and murder. The alliance is known for its rivalry with the Folk Nation and uses symbols such as a five-pointed star and left-sided identifiers.

country_links.context: The People Nation has territory in Canada.
